textByHash.6379f056dbaa3ac8cb5c5c1e27ca2435dcae0882: Yeah. I'm Spike and I sell things with spikes, so Spike's Spikes.
textByHash.7c9e6ffa1b203cc278b79e90255b9b8588d0b906: Welcome to Spike's Spikes. Want a mace?
textByHash.8a7818a79e6eb6266abb7053b85c4904f50ba819: You want a mace. Have a look.
textByHash.c2e06a6f71c588c64c4f27d52a35a9366945ad5c: No, my name is Memmis, but everyone calls me Spike.
textByHash.f7b79a81d701f24f6fbc2a61118ffafeed54571d: No idea. Maybe it's because I sell things with spikes. So, want a mace?
